title: The Grinding Table - Biomass
description: An addon for The Grinding Table that adds 20 recipes and a new item.
body:
An add-on pack for [The Grinding Table](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-grinding-table/) that adds a new item called Biomass, that you can make in the Grinding Table and then use for composting.

Make sure to put this pack over the TGT Datapack, otherwise it won't work!


<details>
<summary>Full list of Biomass grinding recipes</summary>
  
- Bamboo
- Chorus
- Raw Meat
- Cooked Meat
- Poisonous Potatos
- Spider Eyes
- Rotten Flesh
- Froglight
- Sculk (excluding Shriekers and Catalysts)
- All Eggs (+frogspawn)
- Coral (+blocks and fans)
- Phantom Membrane
- Jack-o-Lanterns
- Bee Nests
- Cobweb
- Dried Ghast
  
</details>

Inspired by [Bio Fuel](https://wiki.aidancbrady.com/wiki/Bio_Fuel) from [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism).
